list.name: Config Changes
list.rawSql: SELECT collected_at AS time, summary AS text, COALESCE(asset, symbol, source_table) AS tags FROM config_change_events WHERE ('${asset:raw}' = '__all' OR asset = '${asset:raw}' OR asset IS NULL) AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}' OR symbol IS NULL) ORDER BY collected_at

target.rawSql: SELECT collected_at AS time, summary AS text, COALESCE(asset, symbol, source_table) AS tags FROM config_change_events WHERE ('${asset:raw}' = '__all' OR asset = '${asset:raw}' OR asset IS NULL) AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}' OR symbol IS NULL) ORDER BY collected_at

targets.rawSql: SELECT close_time AS time, taker_buy_base_volume::double precision AS value FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' ORDER BY close_time
SELECT close_time AS time, GREATEST(0, (volume - taker_buy_base_volume))::double precision AS value FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' ORDER BY close_time
SELECT close_time AS time, CASE WHEN volume > 0 THEN (taker_buy_base_volume / volume)::double precision ELSE NULL END AS value FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' ORDER BY close_time
SELECT close_time AS time, (2 * taker_buy_base_volume - volume)::double precision AS value FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' ORDER BY close_time
SELECT NOW() AS time, SUM(taker_buy_base_volume)::double precision AS value FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(close_time)
SELECT NOW() AS time, SUM(GREATEST(0, volume - taker_buy_base_volume))::double precision AS value FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(close_time)

SELECT NOW() AS time, CASE WHEN SUM(volume) > 0 THEN (SUM(taker_buy_base_volume) / SUM(volume))::double precision ELSE NULL END AS value FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(close_time)

panels.title: Buy Share % Selected Range Weighted Avg

targets.rawSql: SELECT NOW() AS time, SUM(2 * taker_buy_base_volume - volume)::double precision AS value FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(close_time)

panels.title: Net Taker Flow Selected Range Sum

targets.rawSql: SELECT NOW() AS time, AVG(taker_buy_base_volume)::double precision AS value FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(close_time)
SELECT NOW() AS time, AVG(GREATEST(0, volume - taker_buy_base_volume))::double precision AS value FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(close_time)

WITH candle_shares AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN volume > 0 THEN (taker_buy_base_volume / volume)::double precision ELSE NULL END AS buy_share_pct FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(close_time) ) SELECT NOW() AS time, AVG(buy_share_pct)::double precision AS value FROM candle_shares
SELECT NOW() AS time, AVG(2 * taker_buy_base_volume - volume)::double precision AS value FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(close_time)

panels.title: Net Taker Flow Selected Range Avg

targets.rawSql: SELECT close_time AS time, taker_buy_base_volume::double precision AS buy_volume, -GREATEST(0, (volume - taker_buy_base_volume))::double precision AS sell_volume FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(close_time) ORDER BY close_time

SELECT close_time AS time, CASE WHEN volume > 0 THEN (taker_buy_base_volume / volume)::double precision ELSE NULL END AS buy_share_pct, CASE WHEN volume > 0 THEN ((volume - taker_buy_base_volume) / volume)::double precision ELSE NULL END AS sell_share_pct FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(close_time) ORDER BY close_time

WITH flows AS ( SELECT close_time, (2 * taker_buy_base_volume - volume)::double precision AS net_taker_flow FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' ) SELECT close_time AS time, net_taker_flow, SUM(net_taker_flow) OVER (ORDER BY close_time ROWS BETWEEN 23 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS rolling_net_flow FROM flows WHERE $__timeFilter(close_time) ORDER BY close_time

panels.title: Net Taker Flow & Rolling Net Flow

targets.rawSql: WITH k AS ( SELECT close_time, (2 * taker_buy_base_volume - volume)::double precision AS net_taker_flow FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' ), i AS ( SELECT collected_at, available_inventory::double precision AS inventory, LAG(available_inventory::double precision) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) AS prev_inventory FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}' ), joined AS ( SELECT k.close_time, k.net_taker_flow, COALESCE(i.inventory - i.prev_inventory, 0) AS inventory_delta FROM k LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT collected_at, inventory, prev_inventory FROM i WHERE collected_at <= k.close_time ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) i ON TRUE ) SELECT close_time AS time, net_taker_flow, inventory_delta, (net_taker_flow - inventory_delta) AS flow_inventory_divergence FROM joined WHERE $__timeFilter(close_time) ORDER BY close_time
SELECT close_time AS time, close::double precision AS price FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(close_time) ORDER BY close_time

SELECT collected_at AS time, available_inventory::double precision AS inventory FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

WITH inv AS ( SELECT collected_at, available_inventory::double precision AS inv, LAG(available_inventory::double precision) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) AS prev_inv FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}' ) SELECT collected_at AS time, -GREATEST(0, prev_inv - inv) AS borrow_proxy FROM inv WHERE $__timeFilter(collected_at) AND prev_inv IS NOT NULL ORDER BY collected_at

WITH inv AS ( SELECT collected_at, available_inventory::double precision AS inv, LAG(available_inventory::double precision) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) AS prev_inv FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}' ) SELECT collected_at AS time, GREATEST(0, inv - prev_inv) AS repay_proxy FROM inv WHERE $__timeFilter(collected_at) AND prev_inv IS NOT NULL ORDER BY collected_at

WITH ratios AS ( SELECT close_time, CASE WHEN (volume - taker_buy_base_volume) > 0 THEN (taker_buy_base_volume / (volume - taker_buy_base_volume))::double precision ELSE NULL END AS ratio, LAG( CASE WHEN (volume - taker_buy_base_volume) > 0 THEN (taker_buy_base_volume / (volume - taker_buy_base_volume))::double precision ELSE NULL END ) OVER (ORDER BY close_time) AS prev_ratio FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' ) SELECT close_time AS time, CASE WHEN prev_ratio > 0 THEN ((ratio - prev_ratio) / prev_ratio * 100) ELSE NULL END AS buy_sell_pct_change FROM ratios WHERE $__timeFilter(close_time) ORDER BY close_time

panels.title: Combined: Price, Inventory, Borrow/Repay Proxy, Buy/Sell Change

targets.rawSql: SELECT close_time AS time, close::double precision AS price FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(close_time) ORDER BY close_time

WITH ratios AS ( SELECT close_time, CASE WHEN (volume - taker_buy_base_volume) > 0 THEN (taker_buy_base_volume / (volume - taker_buy_base_volume))::double precision ELSE NULL END AS ratio, LAG( CASE WHEN (volume - taker_buy_base_volume) > 0 THEN (taker_buy_base_volume / (volume - taker_buy_base_volume))::double precision ELSE NULL END ) OVER (ORDER BY close_time) AS prev_ratio FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' ) SELECT close_time AS time, CASE WHEN prev_ratio > 0 THEN ((ratio - prev_ratio) / prev_ratio * 100) ELSE NULL END AS buy_sell_pct_change FROM ratios WHERE $__timeFilter(close_time) ORDER BY close_time
SELECT close_time AS time, close::double precision AS price FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(close_time) ORDER BY close_time

SELECT collected_at AS time, available_inventory::double precision AS inventory FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

WITH inv AS ( SELECT collected_at, available_inventory::double precision AS inv, LAG(available_inventory::double precision) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) AS prev_inv FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}' ) SELECT collected_at AS time, -GREATEST(0, prev_inv - inv) AS borrow_proxy FROM inv WHERE $__timeFilter(collected_at) AND prev_inv IS NOT NULL ORDER BY collected_at

WITH inv AS ( SELECT collected_at, available_inventory::double precision AS inv, LAG(available_inventory::double precision) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) AS prev_inv FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}' ) SELECT collected_at AS time, GREATEST(0, inv - prev_inv) AS repay_proxy FROM inv WHERE $__timeFilter(collected_at) AND prev_inv IS NOT NULL ORDER BY collected_at

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT base_asset AS __text, base_asset AS __value FROM margin_pairs WHERE is_margin_trade = TRUE AND quote_asset IN ('USDC','USDT','FDUSD') UNION SELECT DISTINCT asset, asset FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
list.label: asset
list.name: asset
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT base_asset AS __text, base_asset AS __value FROM margin_pairs WHERE is_margin_trade = TRUE AND quote_asset IN ('USDC','USDT','FDUSD') UNION SELECT DISTINCT asset, asset FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT symbol AS __text, symbol AS __value FROM margin_pairs WHERE base_asset = '$asset' AND is_margin_trade = TRUE AND quote_asset IN ('USDC','USDT','FDUSD') ORDER BY quote_asset ASC LIMIT 1
list.label: symbol
list.name: symbol
list.query: SELECT symbol AS __text, symbol AS __value FROM margin_pairs WHERE base_asset = '$asset' AND is_margin_trade = TRUE AND quote_asset IN ('USDC','USDT','FDUSD') ORDER BY quote_asset ASC LIMIT 1
